stories.title: Clark rides roller coaster to 2nd U.S. Open crown
stories.summary: Wyndham Clark captured his second U.S. Open title after nearly squandering a six-stroke lead, becoming the first wire-to-wire winner since 2014.

stories.title: Sources: B. Tkachuk to Panthers, joins brother
stories.summary: Ottawa Senators captain Brady Tkachuk was dealt to the Florida Panthers for a host of draft picks Sunday, pairing the rugged left wing with his brother, Matthew, on a two-time Stanley Cup championship team that missed the playoffs this past season.

stories.title: Cape Verde cause latest WC shock, deny Uruguay
stories.summary: Cape Verde's magical start to its first World Cup isn't over. It might just be getting started.

stories.title: Iran played 'beautiful game' in worst conditions
stories.summary: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei said his team played a "beautiful game" under the worst possible conditions in their 0-0 draw with Belgium at SoFi Stadium on Sunday.

stories.title: Russell, 17, surprises dad with caddie swap on 18
stories.summary: Miles Russell, 17, surprised his father on the 18th hole of the U.S. Open by having his caddie hand over his clubs and bib so he could carry his son's clubs the rest of the way.
